title: 3-Ingredient Condensed Milk Ice Cream
excerpt: Ingredients 500 ml cream 5 ml vanilla extract 1 tin condensed milk Method Whip the cream until it thickens Add the vanilla Now slowly whisk in the condensed milk until it's nice and thick. Leave it overnight in the freezer and serve with Honeycomb

seo.title: 3-Ingredient Condensed Milk Ice Cream - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml cream
  • 5 ml vanilla extract
  • 1 tin condensed milk

Method

  1. Whip the cream until it thickens
  2. Add the vanilla
  3. Now slowly whisk in the condensed milk until it's nice and thick.

Leave it overnight in the freezer and serve with Honeycomb
